title: RarityCore For Fabric
description: A Minecraft mod that adds more rarity to items and displays colored borders around them
body:
# Rarity Core For Fabric

Fabric version of [RarityCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/raritycore).

A Minecraft mod that adds more rarity to items and displays colored borders around them.

## **Project Documentation**

https://github.com/Yanbwe/RarityCore/wiki

## **Version Differences**

### Lite Version - Fabric Version (Current Version)
- ✅ Item border rendering (texture/color)  
- ✅ Item name rarity colorization  
- ✅ Data pack support  
- 🟡 Basic configuration system and commands  
- 🟡 Basic network synchronization  
- 🟡 Basic rendering cache  
- ❌ Tooltip injection feature  
- ❌ NBT matching system  
- ❌ Rarity removal support  
- ❌ Edit mode  

### Full Version - Forge Version
- ✅ Item border rendering (texture/color)  
- ✅ Item name rarity colorization  
- ✅ Complete configuration system and commands  
- ✅ Data pack support  
- ✅ Advanced network synchronization  
- ✅ Advanced rendering cache  
- ✅ Tooltip injection feature  
- ✅ NBT matching system  
- ✅ Rarity removal support  
- ✅ Edit mode  

Since porting this mod to Fabric is **almost equivalent to rewriting**, the missing features of the lite version will be gradually added in subsequent updates.
